reviews.review_title: To everyone saying to bring the game bac
reviews.review_description: The game was hacked and will not be returning, and if bananasxr decided he wanted to bring it back, he deleted everything from it so he would have to start from scratch to rebuild every single aspect of it. He is working on a new game right now that you should be able to play when it's finished, so for now, we should just keep finding other games to play while the bananasxr is working on the next game, and if he takes a break it's well deserved after what happened.
I love it why
I want to bring the game back. I miss the game and the cosmetics. I’ve been playing this game since July or October. Please bring it back the best game that I ever played.
Me and my friends used to love this game and used to play it all the time and seeing it go feels like we’ve lost a chunk of life so if theres anything you can do to bring it back just do it
The game got hacked. I used to play that game all the time.

Me and my friends loved this game even more than gtag pls bring it back i miss it it was so fun

reviews.review_description:
I used to play this game with my friend galaxy gg the game should come back pretty please 🙏 
🙁
I had it before this even happened. The new update oh my God it is I was even too scared to even go in there and I’m like holy Jesus ￼

It was good at first beat the game then i rejoin later to play with friends and I was invisible and I thought I was joining and I was in and still invisible so I reset my game and I was baned and it said time left and it was like 983221 hours left and there were two things over laying so I could not read it but it was good at frist but if the OWNER sees this pls owner can you do somthing about that because it ait my fault and I was not hacking and it said on my baned I was I gusses baned for Sside and somthing else but I did nothing wrong besides play the game so pls do somthing.and also I am not mad it's a great game but I don't know why I got baned for Sside and zxn so pls if you can help that would be great and also if I could help with mods and stuff that would be nice I want to help make commitment nice so I can play without people yelling the n word and I love to help and be nice so if you could thanks great game tho.

developer_response.body: The game is shutting down. Attackers infiltrated the game and banned over twelve thousand players. We are sorry you are banned.

reviews.review_description: i have not played this game yet but it looks really fun

It says my ban reason is aside and Zxn runs and then it goes through the board T_s then it says hours and bunch of words st the same time I can not make a word of overall i love the game please unban me so I can play again

developer_response.body: The game got hacked and is being deleted as we speak. Apologies for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_title: I am really sad to see this game gone
reviews.review_description: So I am sad because I played when the head was there it was the best I play with my friends and love the eye we played with it every day for about a month please come back I miss you
Hey monke the co owner ur pretty nice and I just really think ur nice that’s it

The bridge level is so confusing idk what to do, and i couldnt even get to level 2 because the elevator was so glitched i kept falling, like i literally spent 20 minutes of my time trying to get to level 2 because the elevator just did not work, also the game is super tiring after a while, like i feel like the gravity is too strong and a strong push barely gets me anywhere, and with the hallways being so long it really hurts my back, arms, and neck. i think there could be more levels and some changes to the movement.

developer_response.body: The bridge isn't a level, it's the ending as of now. Also, to get up the elevator you have to put your hands up. Please don't play our game if you have back problems or neck problems. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Very fun to mess around in

This game is actually better the scary baboons. 
Reasons- 1. The game doesn’t have the monsters soft lock every hour 2. The game isn’t glitched as much as scary baboons 3. The servers work.

Over all this game is actually good the moderators are actually kind 

Lastly DONT ASK FOR MOD GUYS EVEN IN THE REVIEWS JUST STOP PLS

Yo I just found this game and it’s really cool, there are some very unique cosmetics and a camera mod. Also I kinda want to sign up for fingerpainter or mod cause I got 1.6k subs idk if that’s good or not but overall great game I recommend getting it.

reviews.review_title: I got banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: I was playing and I got banned ￼

developer_response.body: You most likely violated the rules. We don't ban falsely. When you get banned during gameplay, it doesn't take effect until the next time you open your game.

reviews.review_title: One of my favorite games in a while
reviews.review_description: Even though it’s not finished it’s still very polished and the ending with bridge breaking is top notch with it always catching me off guard,I also love the fact that there is a Glock,me and my friends often just start saying “stick ‘em up” as a joke with the glocks,this game needs more attention in my opinion
Scariest
this game is really cool, awesome stuff, besides the fact the monsters are really fast which idc about. 10/10 game keep up the work!
